flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kansas State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Kansas State University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (41.5% → 49.5%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Kansas State University are 14% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($57.3k vs $50.2k).
